title: 新年前壞機，10-11k砌機list 求評

replies.msg:
本身都諗住新年後換機，點知就係捱唔到過年
麻煩各位幫手執執佢，想玩anthem， 唔超頻，有錯屌細力D thx!
CPU: Intel Core i7-8700
Main Board: ASUS ROG Strix B360-F GAMING
Ram: ADATA Premier DDR4 2666 8GB x2 (有無更好選擇?)
Display Card: ASUS ROG-STRIX-RTX2060-O6G-GAMING
SSD: Samsung 970 Evo 500GB
HDD: WD Blue 3.5 inch HDD 1TB
PSU: Corsair RM650X or Acbel iPower 90m 700W (邊隻好d?)
Case: Fractal Design Define C Glass - Black
